new_classes.label_en: Blended Scotch whisky blending process (blending of one or more single malt Scotch whiskies with one or more single grain Scotch whiskies)
new_classes.label_de: Blended-Scotch-Whisky-Mischprozess (Mischen eines oder mehrerer Single Malt Scotch Whiskies mit einem oder mehreren Single Grain Scotch Whiskies)
new_classes.definition_en: The production process by which Blended Scotch Whisky is made, consisting of blending one or more single malt Scotch whiskies with one or more single grain Scotch whiskies, both produced and matured in Scotland.

new_classes.label_en: Blended Scotch composition quality (blend of one or more single malt Scotch whiskies with one or more single grain Scotch whiskies)
new_classes.label_de: Blended-Scotch-Zusammensetzungsqualität (Mischung aus einem oder mehreren Single Malt Scotch Whiskies und einem oder mehreren Single Grain Scotch Whiskies)
new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a Scotch whisky that consists of a blend of at least one single malt Scotch whisky and at least one single grain Scotch whisky, distinguishing Blended Scotch Whisky from single malt, single grain, and blended malt Scotch whiskies.

new_classes.label_en: Blended Scotch whisky in containers ≤ 2 L (subheading 2208 30 71)
new_classes.label_de: Blended Scotch Whisky in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von ≤ 2 L (Unterposition 2208 30 71)
new_classes.definition_en: Blended Scotch Whisky produced by blending one or more single malt Scotch whiskies with one or more single grain Scotch whiskies, presented in containers of a capacity not exceeding 2 litres, corresponding to CN subheading 2208 30 71.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the three primary distinguishing criteria from the legal text: (1) the blended Scotch composition (≥1 single malt + ≥1 single grain Scotch whisky), modelled as BlendedScotchCompositionQuality; (2) the Scottish origin, via the existing ScotchWhiskyOriginQuality; (3) the production via blending, via BlendedScotchWhiskyBlendingProcess; and (4) the container size ≤ 2 L, via the existing SmallContainer class. A complement restriction excludes the soda-water variant (22083061) from this class. A minor gap remains: the exact lower/upper container volume bound for subheading 22083071 uses the existing SmallContainer (< 2 L) which covers the ≤ 2 L threshold by approximation (SmallContainer is defined as strictly < 2.0; the CN text says ≤ 2 L). This slight definitional mismatch between strict less-than and less-than-or-equal is a pre-existing TBox modelling limitation and reduces coverage marginally to 0.9.
